audit_result.proof_trace: BlobsByRange requests at FULU_FORK_EPOCH can trigger InvalidRequest error (line 1036) when request_start_slot < oldest_blob_slot AND request is outside availability period. InvalidRequest maps to LowToleranceError penalty (peer_manager/mod.rs:588), violating the no-penalty invariant during fork transition.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Peer requests blobs from early FULU_FORK_EPOCH slots while those blobs are unavailable (pruned or never stored post-PeerDAS activation). If oldest_blob_slot > request slot but within data_availability_boundary, peer receives LowToleranceError penalty despite making a legitimate transition-period request.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-030.text: Peers must not be penalized for requesting blob sidecars from FULU_FORK_EPOCH during transition.
